title: Books Shizo Parano

chunks.content:
Article: Books Shizo Parano
[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Sat Dec 04, 2010 2:15 am Not sure where to post this, but I'll try here ^^ I just noticed this comment from Rei's Japanese wikipedia page. 『スキゾ・パラノ』によると、厳密には「肉体はユイとアダムの遺伝子を半分ずつ受け継いでいる肉体」だと言われている. "According to 'Schizo/Parano', to be exact, '[Rei's] body inherits half each of Yui and Adam's genetics.'" The source for this is page 180 of Schizo (『スギゾ・エヴァンゲリオン』180ページでの貞本義行の発言), and the person speaking is Sadamoto. Could Sadamoto possibly have been right about this or is he just way out of the loop (or did no one really have any idea at the time?). Is there any way this could be true?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Dec 04, 2010 2:38 am 1731298478 wrote: The source for this is page 180 of Schizo (『スギゾ・エヴァンゲリオン』180ページでの貞本義行の発言), and the person speaking is Sadamoto.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Dec 04, 2010 2:44 am ^According to amazon.co.jp, it was published in 1997. Thanks for the informative post, 1731298478 (can I call you 1731?) These books look interesting...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Dec 04, 2010 2:50 am So it's probably not the case (unless the interview was older than the book), thank you for the clarification Lili. LiLi wrote: (can I call you 1731?)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Dec 04, 2010 3:41 am 1731298478 wrote: I will say, I'm under the impression that the roundtables (and maybe the interviews) are a bit... strange at times, but apparently very revealing. IIRC, I've seen speculation that there was drinking involved.... ^^

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Dec 04, 2010 3:48 am Back to the topic at hand... and relating to the info brought up by 1731 ... IIRC, in the (in)famous ep.24 drafts the Giant in the Basement was said to be ADAM, not Lilith... maybe Sadamoto's line goes back to this unused concept? (In their crazy rush to finish Eva they forgot to fax him the latest developments or the interview actually dates back to a bunch of months before the publication of the book?) Also, getting drunk with your co-workers is nothing to be embarrassed about here in Japan, it seems.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Thu Dec 09, 2010 2:58 am 1731298478 wrote: As this is 2ch, I don't know 100% if it's real, except that someone at one point posted the page reference (Parano p. 95 first edition), and it seems consistent with what Anno has said elsewhere. In it, he basically says that he more or less cut Rei out of Eva after Episode 6 because he didn't know how to develop her any further after she smiled.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 10, 2010 3:15 am LiLi wrote: like that End of Evangelion book attributed to Anno... but before ordering I need to find more info...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 10, 2010 3:25 am A while ago? It was only 11/27. Reichu wrote: I have that book [Boku to iu shingo

Article: Books Shizo Parano
           Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 10, 2010 3:25 am A while ago? It was only 11/27. Reichu wrote: I have that book [Boku to iu shingo], and it’s nothing special. Just bits of script from the entire show rearranged into “chapters” about… who the fuck knows. (Maybe some loose association process. “Where are we?” “LCL Sea.” “The contents of the plug have chemically altered to resemble the blah blah…” “A soup of life, huh?”) Book is mostly some kind of graphic design exercise. Much more interesting Eva books out there.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Fri Dec 10, 2010 3:27 am ^Ah, I see. I guess that's why amazon said it was...poetry or something to that effect IIRC! Thanks for the info. I agree that my preciousss might be better spent on hunting for other things ATM. ;) :EDIT: Please do, Reichu. :EDITTRUE^2: BTW, are the Proposal pages all in one issue of Evangelion Chronicle or would I have to buy all of them? Can I get away with buying the digest versions? (I checked the wiki but couldn't figure it out... thanks for any input!)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 10, 2010 3:41 am Will have to split after sleep... Regarding Proposal pages, I have no idea if they're in the Digests. Some research would be required to find out. In the regular issues, the Proposal is spread out -- gotta catch 'em all! If you want high-res scans or something so you can conserve your moneys, I might still have them in my backups somewhere -- my NGE pics are still a total mess after HD crashes from a year ago --; otherwise, they'd be easy enough to redo. I'd be more than willing to provide, since the whole thing was never translated, and the translations that were done haven't been double-checked, and I can always hope...
